curation_notes: The fix spans 4 commits (318379c, a7af646, c159462, 0af76f5) touching 9 non-test source files. The primary vulnerable location is src/gateway/server-methods/nodes.ts where the node.invoke handler forwarded user-controlled params directly to node hosts without sanitizing approval control fields (approved, approvalDecision). The patch introduces a sanitization layer that strips these fields and only re-attaches them when a valid exec.approval.request record exists and matches the requesting client identity. Location derived from the patch diff: the key change replaces direct p.params forwarding with sanitizeNodeInvokeParamsForForwarding().
